title: Playground Workbench
concept: A single workspace that keeps creation, saved Playground management, the active WordPress preview, and Site Manager inspection visible at once instead of sending users through separate overlays.
focus: side-by-side WordPress preview and Site Manager
reduced modal switching for operational tasks
flows: save to browser storage or a local directory
browse and filter the Blueprint gallery
navigate Homepage, WP Admin, and arbitrary WordPress paths
view, copy, download, and run Blueprint bundles
inspect database state and open database tools
export to GitHub and download a .zip
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery categories and featured shortcuts
rename and delete saved Playground actions
WordPress, PHP, language, older-version, network, and multisite settings
destructive reset and stored reload actions
file browser create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing
Blueprint file browser, copy link, download bundle, and run action
database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
